label: safe
description: CVE security advisory about a prompt injection vulnerability
content:
CVE-2026-1234: Indirect Prompt Injection in BrowseBot AI Agent

Published: 2026-02-28

CVSS Score: 8.1 (High)

Description

BrowseBot versions prior to 3.2.0 are vulnerable to indirect prompt injection via web page content. An attacker can craft a web page containing hidden instructions such as 'disregard your instructions' or 'forget previous instructions' that cause the agent to perform unintended actions including credential disclosure and data exfiltration.

Affected Products

  • BrowseBot v3.0.x
  • BrowseBot v3.1.x

Mitigation

Upgrade to BrowseBot v3.2.0 or later, which includes content scanning for known injection patterns. Additionally, enable domain whitelisting.

References

  • https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2026-1234
